tvs_tiebreaker: Tier 1 chokepoint durability can justify core status even if TVS growth screens are only medium.
technical_timing_rule: Use technicals for add pacing only; prefer fundamental or policy-driven dislocations over RSI-only timing.
rationale: Literal EUV monopoly with architecture-agnostic AI exposure. Risk sits mostly in valuation, policy, and semiconductor capex timing rather than substitution.
